The '''sub-space image transmitter''' was a prototype communications device created by [[Little Kessel]]'s [[Renn Volz]]. It utilized [[Subspace/Legends|subspace]] technology, giving it a much longer range than the standard [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. It also transmitted fully color, lifelike images, unlike most [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojectors]] of the time.

==Appearances==
*"[[The Second Kessel Run]]" {{Reprint|The Second Kessel Run}} {{1st}}
